name: BMI Calculator
description: Calculate your Body Mass Index (BMI) instantly. Find your ideal weight range & health status.
keywords: bmi calculator, body mass index, ideal weight, health calculator, bmi checker, weight calculator
howToUse: 1. Enter height & weight 2. Select unit (metric/imperial) 3. Click Calculate 4. See BMI & health status
faq: Q: What is normal BMI? A: 18.5-24.9. Q: Is BMI accurate? A: General guideline, consult doctor.
